component.name: Boulder Relay
component.summary: GTK4 IRC client for Rocky Linux community channels

description.p: Boulder Relay is a GTK4 IRC client written in Rust using relm4. It provides a clean desktop interface for connecting to Libera.Chat with TLS, NickServ authentication, multi-channel chat, and live user lists.
Default channels target the Rocky Linux community: #rockylinux, #rockylinux-devel, and #rockylinux-social. NickServ registration is required to participate in Rocky channels.
